---
title: "Registration"
---

::: {style="font-size: 3rem; text-align: center;"}
:::
Welcome to the Research Software Africa 2026. 

### Call for Volunteers

[Register here](https://forms.gle/7BndopbpXNEudn5AA) to serve as a volunteer during the conference.

### Register for the Conference

Conference registration will open soon. In the meantime, [register here](https://forms.gle/6YdKBMNX19vniVmk8) to receive updates by email.

### Submit a Presentation

[Visit the Call For Presentations](https://www.research-software-africa.org/call_for_presentations.html) page for information on how to apply to present at the conference.

If you already have a [CMT account](https://cmt3.research.microsoft.com/User/Register) and have read the [CFP guidelines](https://www.research-software-africa.org/call_for_presentations.html), please feel free to 
[submit a presentation for RSAfrica26](https://cmt3.research.microsoft.com/RSAfrica2026/Submission/Index)!
